name: Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare tube pan for use.
3. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar and set aside.
4. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Make a well in the dry ingredients and add yolks, oil, cold water, and vanilla.
6. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
7. Gently fold in egg whites into the batter.
8. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
9. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 minutes.
10. Increase temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
11. Invert the pan and allow cake to cool completely before frosting.
